tree.name: Peyton Watson
tree.tradeDescription: Denver traded JaMychal Green and a 2027 1st round pick (protected) to OKC for the #30 pick (Peyton Watson), a 2023 2nd round pick (#40, Maxwell Lewis), and a 2024 2nd round pick (Tyler Kolek)

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 1st Round Pick via DEN
assetsGivenUp.note: Denver's own 2027 first-round pick (conditional/protected), sent to OKC
